name: Surprise Attack
text:
Choose the number and randomize
the letter for your next movement.

This can only be played instantly at the beginning of your turn.

Can't be used on the turn it is drawn.
raw:
Choose the number and randomize
the letter for your next movement.

This can only be played instantly at the beginning of your turn.

Can't be used on the turn it is drawn.

name: Summon X Minions
text: Randomly summon X Minions

name: Summon 1 Minion
text: Randomly summon 1 Minion

name: Lock and Key
text:
Choose an entrance to a building and place a lock on it. 
Randomly place a key on the map.▲

Heroes must collect the key and use it on the locked door to open it. The hero who collects the key must use an action to unlock the door.

If a hero dies with a collected key, they drop the
              Key beside them. Reroll the cost.
raw:
Choose an entrance to a building and place a lock on it. 
Randomly place a key on the map.▲

Heroes must collect the key and use it on the locked door to open it. The hero who collects the key must use an action to unlock the door.

If a hero dies with a collected key, they drop the
              Key beside them. Reroll the cost.

name: Empowered
text: The monster's next Strike this turn rolls +2 attack dice (its blow lands harder).
raw:
The monster's next turn movement can kill heroes diagonally

All other monster rules still apply

name: Drowning Paralysis
text: Choose a hero. They lose a turn.
raw: Choose a hero. They lose a turn.

name: Deathly Fear
text:
Choose X heroes.

They all have -2 to their actions and -4 to movements their next turn
raw:
Choose X heroes.

They all have -2 to their actions and -4 to movements their next turn

name: Curse of Shadows
text:
Target a hero

They have -X+1 to their next action and movement rolls
raw:
Target a hero

They have -X+1 to their next action and movement rolls

name: Crush Forward
text:
Move a monster or minion X spaces.

Movement can be divided between multiple minions and the monster.

If this move lets the monster or a minion Strike a hero, that hero may Flee (roll Defense) as normal.
raw:
Move a monster or minion X spaces.

Movement can be divided between multiple minions and the monster.

If the monster is able to attack a hero by moving this way, allow the hero to escape by rolling a 3 action or higher

name: Creeping Death
text:
Move any minion X spaces.

Movement can be divided between multiple minions.
raw:
Move any minion X spaces.

Movement can be divided between multiple minions.

name: SpellBook +2
text: Increase your next action roll by +2 for one turn only.
raw: Increase your next action roll by +2 for one turn only.

name: SpellBook +1
text: Increase your next action roll by +1 for one turn only
raw: Increase your next action roll by +1 for one turn only

name: Revive
text:
Revive a hero who died.

Set the revived hero's health to 4 (same as a normal revive).

The revived hero can not use their action dice this turn, but can use movement dice.
raw:
Revive a hero who died.

Set the hero's health to their max -5

The revived hero can not use their action dice this turn, but can use movement dice.

name: Rally The Party
text:
Move X heroes to your hero. They choose which space to be placed, they can't be placed through walls.

You can only move heroes who have already taken their turn.
raw:
Move X heroes to your hero. They choose which space to be placed, they can't be placed through walls.

You can only move heroes who have already taken their turn.

name: HideOut
text:
Move to the nearest door and enter it.

If the distance to the nearest door is a tie, you can choose which to go to.
raw:
Move to the nearest door and enter it.

If the distance to the nearest door is a tie, you can choose which to go to.

name: empty
text: You find nothing.

name: Distraction
text:
Make a monster or minion move 1 space in any direction

They can not move through walls or other objects.

You can not move them in a space that would initiate an attack or combat.
raw:
Make a monster or minion move 1 space in any direction

They can not move through walls or other objects.

You can not move them in a space that would initiate an attack or combat.

name: Counter Spell
text: Once you use this card, you can negate the effects of any one card used by the monster on their turn.
raw: Once you use this card, you can negate the effects of any one card used by the monster on their turn.

name: Corrupted Potion
text: The monster draws a card instead.
raw: The monster draws a card instead.

name: Brew a Potion
text: Restore X+2 health to you or a nearby hero.
raw: Restore X+2 health to you or a nearby hero.

name: Boots6
text: Increase the next movement roll by +6 for one turn only.
raw: Increase the next movement roll by +6 for one turn only.

name: Boots4
text: Increase the next movement roll by +4 for one turn only.
raw: Increase the next movement roll by +4 for one turn only.

name: Boots2
text: Increase the next movement roll by +2 for one turn only.
raw: Increase the next movement roll by +2 for one turn only.

name: Aggressive Sprint
text: Increase your next movement and your next action roll by +2 for one turn only.
raw: Increase your next movement and your next action roll by +2 for one turn only.
